title: Bridge Essay: Kundalini Yoga Intervention Increases Hippocampal Volume in Older Adults: A Pilo

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Heat/Fire** (Phase 3) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Heat/Fire to mechanistic neuroscience through Kundalini, Yoga, Intervention, Increases, Hippocampal.

**Kundalini Yoga Intervention Increases Hippocampal Volume in Older Adults: A Pilot Randomized Controlled Trial.** — Int J Yoga. PMID: 36329774. DOI: 10.4103/ijoy.ijoy_25_22. Among arapidly aging population, there is increased need for neuroprotective interventions promoting healthy neurological aging. Mind-body interventions, such as Kundalini yoga, are actively being explored as accessible means to encourage healthy aging. However, little remains known about the neurobiological effects of Kundalini yoga. This pilot randomized-controlled trial (RCT) examined the potential neuroprotective effects of Kundalini yoga in older adults. We conducted an RCT with 11 healthy
